title: Big and Small Numbers
goal: Compare two numbers. The If block only runs when 5 is bigger than 3.

steps.prompt: Drag an If block into the workspace.
Put a compare block in the diamond slot.
Type two numbers, one bigger than the other.
Put a Do block inside the If.

canned_hints: The diamond slot wants a yes-or-no answer.

success_check.message_missing: You need an If block with a compare block inside — and a Do block.
